data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Applied to design interfaces for efficient navigation and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Button sizing and spacing optimized for touch input.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simple decision-making pathways enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Navigation decisions reduced using streamlined menus and search functions.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Adapts familiar design conventions to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: UI elements follow industry standards to reduce user learning curves.

data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Maintains consistent UI elements across the site for improved usability.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Encourages task completion by creating memorable user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Implemented through interactive tutorials and progressive disclosures.
